description: Very inviting 7-year-old bright townhouse located in the centre of a family-oriented complex, offering a quiet setting away from traffic. This 3-bedroom 2.5-bath home features an open-concept main level with 9ft ceilings, east-west exposure for all-day natural light and spacious living and dining areas. The modern kitchen includes quartz countertops, ample cabinetry, pantry, KitchenAid gas range plus access to a large balcony and powder room. Upstairs offers a master bedroom with walk-in closet and ensuite, two additional bedrooms, second full bathroom and laundry closet. Includes 2-car tandem garage, lots of storage space, private backyard, laminate flooring throughout, epoxy garage floor, and short distance to shopping, schools, sports centre and Aldergrove Park. Showings by appointment.
